summary: Choose how to publish the current changes.

options.label: Commit all changes and open a PR
options.rationale: Stages all current work before publishing.
options.commandPreview: git add -A; git commit; git push -u origin HEAD; gh pr create --base dev

reasons: Writes Git history and publishes a branch.

options.label: Commit staged changes only
options.commandPreview: git commit; git push -u origin HEAD; gh pr create --base dev

options.label: Create a draft PR
options.rationale: Publishes the work for early review.
options.commandPreview: git add -A; git commit; git push -u origin HEAD; gh pr create --draft --base dev
